title: Windows Registry Run Key Modification
description: Detects modification of Windows Registry Run/RunOnce keys for persistence, allowing malicious programs to execute at system startup or user login.
query: ('Log Source' = 'Windows Sysmon Events' or 'Log Source' = 'Windows Sysmon Operational Logs' or 'Log Source' = 'SOC Windows Sysmon Logs') and ((('Command Line' like '*CurrentVersion\Run*' or 'Command Line' like '*CurrentVersion\RunOnce*' or 'Command Line' like '*CurrentVersion\RunServices*' or 'Command Line' like '*CurrentVersion\Policies\Explorer\Run*')))
